methodology.description: Conversion rates derived from industry-specific overall rate applied to traffic source base rates

source.title: eCommerce Statistics and Benchmarks by Industry - XP2
source.snippet: Consumer Goods (includes jewelry/accessories): 0.95% overall conversion rate

derivation.method: Industry overall rate × paid traffic base ratio

conv_paid.notes: High-consideration purchase; trust barriers for online jewelry

source.title: eCommerce Statistics and Benchmarks by Industry - XP2
source.snippet: Consumer Goods (includes jewelry/accessories): 0.95% overall conversion rate

derivation.method: Industry overall rate × organic traffic base ratio

conv_organic.notes: Brand recognition crucial; direct traffic converts better

source.title: eCommerce Statistics and Benchmarks by Industry - XP2
source.snippet: Consumer Goods (includes jewelry/accessories): 0.95% overall conversion rate

derivation.method: Industry overall rate × email/retention traffic base ratio

conv_retention.notes: Low repeat frequency; occasion-driven purchases (gifts, milestones)

source.title: Customer Acquisition Cost Benchmarks by Industry

cac_paid.notes: High AOV supports higher CAC; influencer marketing effective

source.title: Average Order Value by Industry
source.snippet: Luxury and jewelry: $436 AOV (full market); DTC fashion jewelry $150-220

source.title: Understanding Margins and Revenue in DTC Ecommerce

gross_margin_typical.notes: High perceived value; materials cost varies significantly
